title: Specify plan.yaml
description:
Validates the structure of `plan.yaml` (at the repo root): the change name, the optional plan-level `lifecycle` (`pending | reviewed` per RFC-25 §Workflow vocabulary), the optional named-sources map, and the ordered list of plan slices with their dependencies, status, and (per RFC-25) structured source bindings plus the optional `divergence` enum. Strict schema — unknown top-level and per-slice fields are rejected.

RFC-25: each slice carries the `target` field (target-adapter identifier — renamed from `adapter` in W0.2) and an optional `divergence` enum (`likely | accepted | rejected`); `slices[].sources[]` items accept either a bare-string source key (shorthand for `{ key: <key>, candidate: <slice.name> }`) or the structured `{ key, candidate }` object form; the top-level `sources` map accepts either a bare string (1.x backward-compat) or a `{ adapter, path?, value? }` object per source key. The per-entry status enum is the RFC-25-collapsed `{pending, in-progress, done}` (v1 has no `blocked`/`failed`/`skipped`); the plan-level `lifecycle` enum is the collapsed `{pending, reviewed}` — `drained` and `currently executing` are computed from per-entry status at read time.

name.description: Change name. Kebab-case; becomes the archive filename prefix.

sources.description: Named source bindings. Keys are kebab-case identifiers referenced by each slice's `sources` list. Values are either a bare string (1.x backward-compat: a path or URL) or the RFC-25 structured object `{ adapter, path?, value? }`.

slices.description: Ordered list of plan slices. Order is the tie-breaker for `specify plan next` when multiple entries are eligible.

lifecycle.description: RFC-25 plan-level lifecycle gate. `pending` is the default after `plan create`; `reviewed` is operator-stamped at Gate 1 via `specify plan transition <plan-name> reviewed`. Two stored states only — `currently executing` and `drained` are computed at read time from per-entry `status`.

kebabName.description: Kebab-case identifier: lowercase letters and digits grouped by single internal hyphens; no leading, trailing, or consecutive hyphens. Matches `specify_slice::actions::validate_name`.

oneOf.description: 1.x backward-compat: bare string carries a path or URL; the adapter is inferred by the caller.

path.description: Filesystem path or repo location the adapter binds against. Mutually exclusive with `value`.

value.description: Literal value supplied directly to the adapter (e.g. the operator brief text for `intent`). Mutually exclusive with `path`.

oneOf.description: Bare-string shorthand: equivalent to `{ key: <key>, candidate: <slice.name> }`. Used predominantly for the degenerate `intent` case (`sources: [intent]`).

key.description: Source key matching a top-level `plan.yaml.sources.<key>` binding.

candidate.description: Candidate id matching a `## Candidate inventory` block in `discovery.md`.

sliceSourceBinding.description: RFC-25 §`Slice.sources` — one (source-key, candidate-id) binding per contributing source.

name.description: Slice name. Unique across the plan; becomes the Specify slice directory name when the entry transitions to `in-progress`.

project.description: Target registry project name. Required for multi-project registries; optional for single-project.

target.description: RFC-25 target-adapter identifier (e.g. `omnia`, `contracts@v1`). Renamed from `adapter` in the W0.2 type rename; the pre-RFC-25 `adapter` field was retired in the same change.

status.description: Current state in the per-entry status state machine. RFC-25 collapses to three states: `pending` (written by `plan add`/`amend`), `in-progress` (written only by `plan next`), `done` (written by `plan transition <name> done`, stamped by `/spec:merge`). v1 has no per-entry `blocked`, `failed`, or `skipped` state — build failures and merge conflicts leave the active entry `in-progress`.

divergence.description: RFC-25 §Plan-time fusion — closed enum for slice-level divergence state. Absent ≡ `none` (the default). `likely` is set by `/spec:plan`'s `propose` sub-step on materially-disagreeing candidate summaries; `accepted` / `rejected` are set by the operator at Gate 1 via `specify plan amend --divergence`. Advisory metadata in v1.

depends-on.description: Slice names that must be `done` before this slice is eligible. Consumed by `specify plan next`.

sources.description: Per-RFC-25, an array of (source-key, candidate-id) bindings. Each item is either a bare string (shorthand for `{ key: <key>, candidate: <slice.name> }`) or the structured `{ key, candidate }` object. Absent or `[]` → degenerate intent slice.

context.description: Baseline paths relevant to this slice, relative to `.specify/`. Briefs use these as a focus hint when scanning baseline directories.

description.description: Free-text scoping context. Carries file-path hints and references to prior slice names for delta-target inference.
